Domestic Violence Protection Order Data in Colorado in 2024

Author

Andrew MacFarland (andrew.macfarland@cuanschutz.edu)

Published

March 13, 2026

Summary

This report provides an overview of Colorado’s Domestic Violence Protection Order (DVPO) cases in 2024. It is an exploratory analysis and has not been QA’d or approved for distribution!

Case Types and Event Codes

In 2024, the following event_code(s) were filed per case_type n times. Duplicate case_number(s) within an event_code case_type pairing were removed. “Protection Order Domestic Violence” appears to be a data entry artifact or error and were excluded.

Case Pathway Analysis

Here we analyze the potential pathways from initial temporary order hearing to final permanent orders (or lack thereof). These data represent events occurring in 2024; some events are from cases that opened before 2024 or closed after 2024.

Cases by County

Here are plots of the top 15 counties by dvpo case filings in 2024 (by count and by rate). Absent is Denver County, cases from which are not included in the data. These data include temporary restraining order hearings ONLY.

Annual Estimates of the Resident Population for Counties in Colorado: April 1, 2020 to July 1, 2024 (CO-EST2024-POP-08). Source: U.S. Census Bureau, Population Division. Release Date: March 2025.
